sentences.translation: Nadija je izgubila svoju zlatnu ogrlicu.

sentences.arabic: بَكَتْ كَثِيرًا لِأَنَّهَا هَدِيَّةٌ مِنْ جَدَّتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Plakala je mnogo jer je to bio poklon od njene bake.
sentences.translationEn: She cried a lot because it was a gift from her grandmother.

sentences.arabic: بَحَثَتْ عَنْهَا فِي الْحَمَّامِ وَفِي الْمَطْبَخِ.
sentences.translation: Tražila je ogrlicu u kupatilu i u kuhinji.
sentences.translationEn: She looked for it in the bathroom and in the kitchen.

sentences.translation: Pronašla je ogrlicu u džepu svog starog kaputa.
sentences.translationEn: She found it in the pocket of her old coat.

sentences.translation: Jako se obradovala i odmah je obukla.
sentences.translationEn: She was very happy and put it on immediately.
